evidence: "I love Tina Fey, but generally leave her movies feeling disappointed. This time it was the opposite... Some humor, some romance, some action."
"Well acted, kept me engaged. I would recommend watching."
"not groundbreaking, but fun to watch and liked the characters Mindy delivers again."
"Well acted, kept me engaged. I would recommend watching."
"Awesome show. So glad I found it"
"Great show! Stumbled on it and couldn't stop watching until I finished all four seasons."
"While it's obviously a low budget movie, still one of the best movies I've seen in a long while."
"I love Tina Fey, but generally leave her movies feeling disappointed."
"David Suchet is Poirot, will always be Poirot, and any attempt to prove otherwise is futile."
"It was poignant with its statement about the fragility of relationships that start with great passion..."
"Some great fight scenes, imaginative, and touching. A rare blend."
"I saw Newsies and that is what made me search out any other movies by the male lead."

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted comedies and dramas with engaging characters and fast pacing. They have a strong appreciation for emotional depth and are loyal to specific creators like Tina Fey and David Suchet.
